title: Wild Crispy Thai Egg Khanom Thai
description: A pungent, crispy one-pot Thai dish with brown sugar and en-croute that delivers a satisfying crunch in every bite.
instructions: Heat the oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add the diced potatoes and stir-fry until they start to brown.
Sprinkle the brown sugar over the potatoes and continue to cook until the sugar caramelizes.
Add the ginger, garlic, and soy sauce, stirring to combine and coat the potatoes evenly.
Push the mixture to the side of the wok and crack the eggs into the space, allowing them to scramble lightly.
Once the eggs are set, mix everything together and pour in the coconut milk.
Add the scallions and lime juice, stirring until the curry is fragrant and the liquid reduces slightly.
Serve immediately while the dish remains hot and crispy.
